title: SpecForge Configuration
description: Configuration file for a SpecForge project. Like tsconfig.json for TypeScript, this file defines project identity, plugins, providers, and code generation targets.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE autocomplete and validation.

name.description: Project name. Used in generated output headers and reports.

version.description: Format version of .spec files. The compiler checks compatibility.

spec_root.description: Path to .spec files relative to the project root directory.

strict.description: When true, warnings are treated as errors.

display_prefix.description: Optional display prefix for reports (e.g., "HP"). Does not affect entity IDs.

plugins.description: Installed plugin packages that extend the entity model.

enhancement_policy.description: How to resolve conflicts when two plugins enhance the same field on the same entity kind.

enhancement_overrides.description: Explicit conflict resolution for enhancement conflicts. Keys are 'entity.field' (e.g., 'behavior.layer'), values are the winning plugin package name.

entity_kind_policy.description: How to resolve conflicts when two plugins register the same entity kind name.

entity_kinds.description: Explicit conflict resolution for entity kind conflicts. Keys are kind names, values are the winning plugin package name.

providers.description: Provider configurations for external reference validation (GitHub, Jira, Figma, etc.).

personas.description: Persona definitions for capability validation. Keys are persona IDs, values are display names.

surfaces.description: Surface definitions for capability validation. Keys are surface IDs, values are display names.

test_dirs.description: Glob patterns for test directories used in traceability analysis.

gen.description: Code generation configurations. Keys are generator names (e.g., "typescript", "rust").

provider.description: Configuration for a single provider instance.

kinds.description: Valid reference kinds for this provider (e.g., ["issue", "pr"]).

id_patterns.description: Regex patterns for validating reference identifiers per kind.

coverage.description: Test coverage thresholds and reporting configuration.

require_violation_tests.description: Require tests for invariant violation paths.

fail_on_unknown_ids.description: Fail if test report contains entity IDs not in the spec.

gen.description: Configuration for a single code generator.

result.description: How to render Result types in generated code.

readonly.description: Whether to add readonly modifiers to generated fields.
